tweets.author: Zaharia_af
tweets.text:
I have been working on a different type of project, just to take my mind off of life, and I would say im 80% done with it. 
Excited to share it asap. 
👀 can you guess what’s the project about? 💀

tweets.author: WGMeets
tweets.text:
INOculate is a visual stream of consciousness, my forever collection that focuses on inner growth and thoughts in abstract form. Each piece is labeled one of three matters, heart, brain or soul, the intent behind this is to label what influenced the expression.
All pieces have https://t.co/PMBdtaW5cU

tweets.author: madebyoona
tweets.text:
Dear Guests, For Human Eyes Only 

in berlin was another performance to subvert surveillance (ai body detection algorithms) using fashion. 

your eyes would see all my curves, 
and the computer none. 

sad computer! https://t.co/LMaOK7h025
